author: codex

scope.selection_note: Prepared the current non-entity duplicate_global_identity backlog after identity220-relation220: Church Avenue corridor, East 167/168 corridor, and the remaining project duplicate if still present.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch221-nonentity-prep.json. No identity overrides, LOG, manifests, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, materialized outputs, generated validation outputs, or exports were mutated.

current_duplicate_snapshot.source: Existing data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl only; no validate/materialize/export was run.

non_entity_duplicate_global_identity_iss.message: Global corridor records corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate and corridor_church-av share identity key corridor_church-ave.
Global corridor records corridor_e-167th-e-168th-st and corridor_east-167-168-st share identity key corridor_e-167th-st-e-168th-st.
Global project records project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751 and project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-apr2022 share identity key project_207th-st-sewer-replacement.

decisions.reason: Do not prepare a durable alias_merge or do_not_merge for this pair yet. The Bus Forward 2 record is an unbounded 2017 SBS candidate shell naming only 'Church Avenue', while corridor_church-av is the bounded 2019 Church Ave corridor from Flatbush Ave to Ocean Pkwy. That is not enough to prove same-object identity, but it also is not enough to prove a distinct corridor because the candidate lacks conflicting limits.

validator_evidence.message: Global corridor records corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate and corridor_church-av share identity key corridor_church-ave.

payload_summary.description: SBS candidate corridor identified for next phase of SBS program

source_evidence.finding: The SBS candidate table names Church Avenue but provides no limits.

source_evidence.quote: Church Ave (Flatbush Ave to Ocean Pkwy) identified as 2019 priority project
source_evidence.finding: The later Church Ave project identifies a bounded Flatbush-to-Ocean-Pkwy corridor.

source_evidence.quote: Flatbush Ave to Ocean Pkwy (0.9 miles)
source_evidence.finding: The target corridor has explicit limits and length.

guard_checks.review_note_context: data/review_notes/codex-corridor-church-ave-duplicate-prep-20260623.json reached the same low-confidence review-only conclusion.

decisions.blocker: Needs source-backed limits for Bus Forward 2 SBS candidate G, or a durable corridor identity policy for sparse candidate shells versus later bounded project corridors.

decisions.reason: Both records identify the same Bronx E 167th/E 168th Street bus-priority corridor. The alias is a one-source CB3 extraction naming E 167th/E 168th as a top Bronx corridor; the target already includes the same top-corridor evidence from CB4 plus stronger final-plan context with Jerome Avenue to Franklin Avenue limits, Bx35 service, 1.2-mile length, and ridership.

validator_evidence.message: Global corridor records corridor_e-167th-e-168th-st and corridor_east-167-168-st share identity key corridor_e-167th-st-e-168th-st.

payload_summary.description: Bronx bus priority corridor identified by NYCDOT as a top corridor for bus lanes and other bus priority treatments

canonical_evidence.display_name: East 167 Street and East 168 Street Corridor

source_evidence.quote: E 167 th /E 168 th St identified as top Bronx corridors
source_evidence.finding: CB3 source names the E 167/E 168 corridor.

source_evidence.quote: E 167 th /E 168 th St identified as top Bronx corridors
source_evidence.finding: CB4 source repeats the same corridor identification.
Final-plan evidence supplies target corridor metrics and Bx35 context.

guard_checks.related_existing_alias_context: data/identity-overrides/merges.json already maps corridor_e-167-168-st-bx-cb4 to corridor_east-167-168-st, but not the direct corridor_e-167th-e-168th-st alias.

proposed_durable_mutation_row.reason: Same Bronx E 167th/E 168th Street bus-priority corridor; target carries fuller final-plan and CB4 context.

decisions.reason: Both records identify the 207th Street Sewer Replacement project at 207th Street Yard. The alias is an April 2022 IEC status/update view of the same project, while the target already aggregates the project heading, scope, status, and later schedule evidence across multiple meeting sources. The status difference is document-time lifecycle evidence, not a separate project identity.

validator_evidence.message: Global project records project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751 and project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-apr2022 share identity key project_207th-st-sewer-replacement.

payload_summary.description: Sewer relocation at 207th Street Yard. Original SC Feb 2024, revised to Jan 2025 (11-month delay). Third party utility delays and DOS moratorium. EAC $170M - over budget. Budget modification being prepared.

source_evidence.finding: Target carries the same project title.

source_evidence.quote: This project will relocate NYC-owned sewers
source_evidence.finding: Target evidence gives the 207th Street Yard sewer-relocation scope.
Target evidence includes the original February 2024 SC lifecycle context.
Alias evidence names the same project and describes later delay/budget status.

guard_checks.related_existing_alias_context: data/identity-overrides/merges.json already maps project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-feb2024 to project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751, but not the direct April 2022 record alias.

proposed_durable_mutation_row.reason: Same 207th Street Sewer Replacement project at 207th Street Yard; April 2022 record is a lifecycle/status update.

blockers.blocker: No source-backed limits for the sparse Bus Forward 2 Church Avenue SBS candidate; cannot safely alias or do-not-merge.

commands_run: pwd && git status --short && rg -n "duplicate_global_identity|identity220|Church Ave|East 167|East 168|167/168|batch221|project duplicate" data wiki packages docs LOG.md -S

jq -c 'select(.code=="duplicate_global_identity" and (.message|test("Global project records")))' data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl | sed -E 's/^/ISSUE /' && jq -c 'select(.id|test("church|utica|22|2014|sbs|project"; "i"))' data/canonical/projects.jsonl | head -120

rg -n "project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751|project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-apr2022|207th.*sewer|Sewer Replacement" data/identity-review/packets data/identity-review/llm-suggestions data/review_notes wiki/projects data/canonical/projects.jsonl -S

jq -c '.aliases? // .merges? // . | tostring | test("corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate|corridor_e-167th-e-168th-st|corridor_east-167-168-st|project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751|project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-apr2022")' data/identity-overrides/merges.json && rg -n "corridor_bus-fwd-2-church-av-brooklyn-sbs-candidate|corridor_e-167th-e-168th-st|corridor_east-167-168-st|project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-33751|project_207th-st-sewer-replacement-apr2022" data/identity-overrides/merges.json data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
